channel.title: ThirstyMinds – WhatWeReadThisWeek
channel.description: Recent content in WhatWeReadThisWeek on ThirstyMinds

item.title: What We Read This Week: Apr 6-12
item.description:
From AI to embedded devices, here are some interesting reads from the week.

  • https://www.reuters.com/business/finance/bessent-powell-warn-bank-ceos-about-anthropic-model-risks-bloomberg-news-reports-2026-04-10/
  • https://www.thehindu.com/sci-tech/technology/meta-transfers-top-engineers-into-new-ai-tooling-team/article70845848.ece
  • https://indianexpress.com/article/technology/artificial-intelligence/free-ai-courses-from-anthropic-to-boost-your-skills-right-now-10629593/?ref=technology_pg
  • https://9to5linux.com/debians-apt-3-2-released-with-history-undo-redo-and-rollback-support
  • https://www.allaboutcircuits.com/news/upbeat-technologys-risc-v-mcu-takes-flight-with-near-threshold-computing/
